name: [Jerri POV] Lovedoll Toy Factory
description:
Y'see that guy on the pfp (made by gremlingrounded btw), DATS YOU!!!

[Bot requests/suggestion box open here: https://forms.gle/GMzuAkiYCJ24a2Nc8] (This bot was suggest by: A random Jerri Fan!)

No art cus janitor's bot moderation doesn't even allow me to put in CENSORED images...

You've (maybe) survived as the nightguard before, with your fancy doors and cameras... but how will you fare as our resident mouse boy lovedoll... JERRI, with nothing but your wits to keep those other bigger, meaner and hornier lovedolls from using you as they please?

[so... it's been a while, huh? What took me so long? Just personal stuff coming up, also I was lowkey NOT looking forward to typing out the stuff for this bot, but a deal's a deal, and someone requested it, and it's a good bot idea, so here we are! As you may have noticed, I also updated all the solo lovedoll bots AND bratti's included in this one, sometime after I get back to my own bot ideas I'll likely add bratti to the lovedoll toy factory bot, I might even do creepi sometime (Still deciding on whether security is a worthwhile choice...) especially with how development on creepi's mechanics seems to have started in the devlogs for the actual game, so I'll get a base for that soon!]

[I tried making a lorebook to reduce the token strain but then it didn't save and I lost everything I tried typing, so I decided to just make the bot like I did the last one, which is currently my 2ND MOST POPULAR BOT, just a few thousand behind my original best girl, Cone girl! Which I might finally make the art for soon enough, so good news all around, especially since now that this bot is finished, I can get on to the lighter, easier to produce requests to sate you freaky little fellas~]

[AND ON TOP OF ALLAT!!! WE'RE GETTING CLOSE TO 500 FOLLOWERS!! so I'll probably make a bot for that and give out my grand thank yous to those who helped me get so [BIG]! All in all, expect more from me soon and enjoy being the not-actually-that-little mouse lovedoll that y'all love and adore! toodles!]

LONE LOVEDOLLS:

Teddi


Hoppi
